updates.title: Kaziranga Safari Bookings Open
updates.summary: Bookings for the upcoming safari season are now available online. Visitors can choose morning or afternoon elephant and jeep safaris.

updates.title: Hornbill Festival Dates Announced
updates.summary: Nagaland's flagship cultural festival returns with tribal dance, music, and food stalls celebrating the state's indigenous heritage.

updates.title: Heavy Rain Alert for Western Ghats
updates.summary: The weather department has issued an orange alert for hill stations in the region. Trekkers are advised to check conditions before heading out.

updates.title: Landslide Closes Manali-Leh Highway Stretch
updates.summary: A section of the highway is temporarily closed for debris clearance. Alternate routes are being used for essential traffic.

updates.title: New Homestay Cluster Promotes Eco Tourism
updates.summary: A village cooperative has launched eco-friendly homestays focused on organic farming tours and low-impact travel.

updates.title: Elephant Corridor Restrictions in Effect
updates.summary: Forest authorities have restricted vehicle movement during dusk hours to reduce human-elephant conflict near the reserve.

updates.title: Jim Corbett Extends Visiting Hours
updates.summary: The park has extended gate timings for the peak season, giving visitors more time for morning and evening safaris.

updates.title: New Tourist Train Route Launched
updates.summary: A scenic new rail route connecting key heritage towns has begun operations, with vista-dome coaches for sightseeing.

updates.title: Beachside Resorts Offer Monsoon Discounts
updates.summary: Several resorts are offering reduced off-season rates for the monsoon period, bundled with local sightseeing packages.

updates.title: Classical Dance Festival Returns to Khajuraho
updates.summary: The week-long festival showcases classical Indian dance forms against the backdrop of the historic temple complex.
